ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  KN Agri Resources Limited has filed its Regulation 74(5) certificate for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, confirming compliance with SEBI guidelines. The attached certificate from MUFG Intime India Private Limited states the regulation is not applicable as all company shares are entirely in dematerialized form, with no requests for rematerialization received during the period. This indicates a fully dematerialized shareholding base, signifying efficient and modern share transfer practices with no red flags.
